canvas.html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>ink</title>
<style>
* { margin: 0; padding: 0; box-sizing: border-box; }
html, body { width: 100%; height: 100%; overflow: hidden; background: #0a0a0f; }
canvas { display: block; width: 100%; height: 100%; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<canvas id="canvas"></canvas>
<script>
const canvas = document.getElementById('canvas');
const ctx = canvas.getContext('2d');

let W, H;
let audioCtx, noiseNode, filterNode, gainNode;
let audioStarted = false;

function resize() {
  W = canvas.width = window.innerWidth;
  H = canvas.height = window.innerHeight;
}
resize();
window.addEventListener('resize', resize);

// Ink particle system
const particles = [];
const maxParticles = 8000;
const flowField = [];
const flowRes = 20;
let flowCols, flowRows;
let time = 0;
let mouseX = W / 2, mouseY = H / 2;
let mouseActive = false;

function initFlowField() {
  flowCols = Math.ceil(W / flowRes);
  flowRows = Math.ceil(H / flowRes);
  for (let i = 0; i < flowCols * flowRows; i++) {
    flowField[i] = { angle: 0, strength: 0.3 };
  }
}
initFlowField();

class InkParticle {
  constructor(x, y, hue) {
    this.x = x;
    this.y = y;
    this.vx = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2;
    this.vy = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 2 - 0.5;
    this.hue = hue; // 320 = pink, 180 = cyan
    this.saturation = 80 + Math.random() * 20;
    this.lightness = 50 + Math.random() * 20;
    this.alpha = 0.8;
    this.size = 2 + Math.random() * 3;
    this.life = 1;
    this.decay = 0.001 + Math.random() * 0.002;
    this.noiseOffsetX = Math.random() * 1000;
    this.noiseOffsetY = Math.random() * 1000;
  }

  update() {
    // Perlin-like noise for organic movement
    const noiseScale = 0.003;
    const nx = Math.sin((this.x + this.noiseOffsetX) * noiseScale + time * 0.5) * 
               Math.cos((this.y + this.noiseOffsetY) * noiseScale * 0.7);
    const ny = Math.cos((this.y + this.noiseOffsetY) * noiseScale + time * 0.3) * 
               Math.sin((this.x + this.noiseOffsetX) * noiseScale * 0.8);

    // Flow field influence
    const col = Math.floor(this.x / flowRes);
    const row = Math.floor(this.y / flowRes);
    if (col >= 0 && col < flowCols && row >= 0 && row < flowRows) {
      const idx = col + row * flowCols;
      const flow = flowField[idx];
      this.vx += Math.cos(flow.angle) * flow.strength * 0.1;
      this.vy += Math.sin(flow.angle) * flow.strength * 0.1;
    }

    // Organic turbulence
    this.vx += nx * 0.15;
    this.vy += ny * 0.15;

    // Buoyancy - ink rises slightly
    this.vy -= 0.02;

    // Mouse influence - creates currents
    if (mouseActive) {
      const dx = this.x - mouseX;
      const dy = this.y - mouseY;
      const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
      if (dist < 200 && dist > 1) {
        const force = (200 - dist) / 200;
        // Circular current around mouse
        const angle = Math.atan2(dy, dx) + Math.PI * 0.5;
        this.vx += Math.cos(angle) * force * 0.3;
        this.vy += Math.sin(angle) * force * 0.3;
      }
    }

    // Friction (water viscosity)
    this.vx *= 0.98;
    this.vy *= 0.98;

    this.x += this.vx;
    this.y += this.vy;

    // Diffusion - particles spread out
    this.size += 0.02;
    this.life -= this.decay;
    this.alpha = this.life * 0.6;

    // Hue shifts slightly as ink disperses
    if (this.hue > 300) {
      this.hue -= 0.1; // Pink shifts toward magenta
    } else if (this.hue < 200) {
      this.hue += 0.1; // Cyan shifts toward teal
    }
  }

  draw() {
    if (this.alpha <= 0) return;
    ctx.beginPath();
    ctx.arc(this.x, this.y, this.size, 0, Math.PI * 2);
    ctx.fillStyle = `hsla(${this.hue}, ${this.saturation}%, ${this.lightness}%, ${this.alpha})`;
    ctx.fill();
  }

  isDead() {
    return this.life <= 0 || this.x < -50 || this.x > W + 50 || this.y < -50 || this.y > H + 50;
  }
}

function dropInk(x, y, hue, count = 50) {
  for (let i = 0; i < count; i++) {
    if (particles.length < maxParticles) {
      const offsetX = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 30;
      const offsetY = (Math.random() - 0.5) * 30;
      // Slight hue variation
      const hueVar = hue + (Math.random() - 0.5) * 30;
      particles.push(new InkParticle(x + offsetX, y + offsetY, hueVar));
    }
  }
}

function updateFlowField() {
  time += 0.01;
  for (let row = 0; row < flowRows; row++) {
    for (let col = 0; col < flowCols; col++) {
      const idx = col + row * flowCols;
      const x = col * flowRes;
      const y = row * flowRes;
      
      // Slow rotating flow patterns
      const angle = Math.sin(x * 0.005 + time) * Math.cos(y * 0.005 + time * 0.7) * Math.PI * 2;
      flowField[idx].angle = angle;
      
      // Mouse creates stronger currents nearby
      if (mouseActive) {
        const dx = x - mouseX;
        const dy = y - mouseY;
        const dist = Math.sqrt(dx * dx + dy * dy);
        if (dist < 150) {
          flowField[idx].strength = 0.5 + (150 - dist) / 150 * 0.5;
          flowField[idx].angle = Math.atan2(dy, dx) + Math.PI * 0.5;
        } else {
          flowField[idx].strength = 0.3;
        }
      }
    }
  }
}

// Underwater ambient audio
function initAudio() {
  if (audioStarted) return;
  audioStarted = true;
  
  audioCtx = new (window.AudioContext || window.webkitAudioContext)();
  
  // Deep underwater rumble - brown noise
  const bufferSize = 2 * audioCtx.sampleRate;
  const buffer = audioCtx.createBuffer(1, bufferSize, audioCtx.sampleRate);
  const data = buffer.getChannelData(0);
  
  let lastOut = 0;
  for (let i = 0; i < bufferSize; i++) {
    const white = Math.random() * 2 - 1;
    data[i] = (lastOut + (0.02 * white)) / 1.02;
    lastOut = data[i];
    data[i] *= 3.5;
  }
  
  noiseNode = audioCtx.createBufferSource();
  noiseNode.buffer = buffer;
  noiseNode.loop = true;
  
  // Muffled underwater filter
  filterNode = audioCtx.createBiquadFilter();
  filterNode.type = 'lowpass';
  filterNode.frequency.value = 200;
  filterNode.Q.value = 1;
  
  gainNode = audioCtx.createGain();
  gainNode.gain.value = 0.15;
  
  noiseNode.connect(filterNode);
  filterNode.connect(gainNode);
  gainNode.connect(audioCtx.destination);
  
  noiseNode.start();
}

// Bubble sound on click
function playBubble() {
  if (!audioCtx) return;
  
  const osc = audioCtx.createOscillator();
  const gain = audioCtx.createGain();
  
  osc.type = 'sine';
  osc.frequency.setValueAtTime(800 + Math.random() * 400, audioCtx.currentTime);
  osc.frequency.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(200, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.15);
  
  gain.gain.setValueAtTime(0.1, audioCtx.currentTime);
  gain.gain.exponentialRampToValueAtTime(0.001, audioCtx.currentTime + 0.2);
  
  osc.connect(gain);
  gain.connect(audioCtx.destination);
  
  osc.start();
  osc.stop(audioCtx.currentTime + 0.2);
}

// Auto-drop ink periodically
let lastAutoDrop = 0;
function autoDrop() {
  if (Date.now() - lastAutoDrop > 2000) {
    const x = Math.random() * W;
    const y = Math.random() * H * 0.3 + H * 0.2;
    const hue = Math.random() > 0.5 ? 320 : 185; // Pink or cyan
    dropInk(x, y, hue, 30);
    lastAutoDrop = Date.now();
  }
}

// Mouse events
canvas.addEventListener('mousemove', (e) => {
  mouseX = e.clientX;
  mouseY = e.clientY;
  mouseActive = true;
});

canvas.addEventListener('mouseleave', () => {
  mouseActive = false;
});

canvas.addEventListener('click', (e) => {
  initAudio();
  playBubble();
  
  // Alternate pink and cyan
  const hue = Math.random() > 0.5 ? 320 : 185;
  dropInk(e.clientX, e.clientY, hue, 80);
});

// Initial ink drops
setTimeout(() => {
  dropInk(W * 0.3, H * 0.3, 320, 60); // Pink
  dropInk(W * 0.7, H * 0.4, 185, 60); // Cyan
}, 500);

function animate() {
  // Very subtle fade for trailing effect
  ctx.fillStyle = 'rgba(10, 10, 15, 0.03)';
  ctx.fillRect(0, 0, W, H);
  
  updateFlowField();
  autoDrop();
  
  // Update and draw particles
  for (let i = particles.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
    const p = particles[i];
    p.update();
    p.draw();
    
    if (p.isDead()) {
      particles.splice(i, 1);
    }
  }
  
  // Blend layer for mixing colors
  ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'lighter';
  for (const p of particles) {
    if (p.alpha > 0.1) {
      ctx.beginPath();
      ctx.arc(p.x, p.y, p.size * 0.5, 0, Math.PI * 2);
      ctx.fillStyle = `hsla(${p.hue}, ${p.saturation}%, ${p.lightness * 0.3}%, ${p.alpha * 0.3})`;
      ctx.fill();
    }
  }
  ctx.globalCompositeOperation = 'source-over';
  
  requestAnimationFrame(animate);
}

animate();
</script>
</body>
</html>
